title: British Date Spread with Italian Twist
description: A simple and delicious spread made with British dates, sweet and chewy, perfect for a sweet Italian treat.
instructions: Soak the British dates in water for 30 minutes.
Drain the water and blend the dates with sweet, chewy, and spread until smooth.
Add almond extract and lemon zest if using.
Taste and adjust the sweetness as needed.
Transfer the spread to a serving bowl.
Serve with crackers, bread, or fruit.
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
Allow the spread to come to room temperature before serving.
